states.name: Shadow Double
states.title: Legendary Thief's Backup
states.description: Mysterious silhouettes flickering in the dark, targeting their opponents' weak points with surgical precision. They might be nothing but phantoms created by Goemon's masterful ninjutsu, but the damage their blades can deal is no illusion.
